plugins.name: codelore
plugins.description: Project docs as an auto-loaded context layer for AI sessions. Four skills: write, bulk-migrate, route into context, and critically review.

plugins.name: qa-vault-skills
plugins.description: Four skills that make an AI agent a QA practitioner for the QA Vault platform: author manual UI test scenarios, maintain them as the product changes, search the repository, and organize suites and tags.
